name: Starboard with reaction-threshold ramp
description: Starboard with a self-tuning threshold: starts at 5 stars to be featured, raises by 1 each time the server crosses 1000 active members. Prevents the same handful of regulars from dominating once the community grows.
i18nNotes: Starboard embed title and footer keyed; user message content is featured as-is (already user-authored).
